content.description: Sign-on policy evaluations, routing rule hits, MFA factor usage and failures.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>Okta: Policy & MFA Monitor</label>
    <description>Sign-on policy evaluations, routing rule hits, MFA factor usage and failures.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "Okta: Policy & MFA Monitor", "description": "Sign-on policy evaluations, routing rule hits, MFA factor usage and failures.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}, "input_user": {"options": {"defaultValue": "*", "token": "user"}, "title": "User (default: *)", "type": "input.text"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_policy_evals": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_evals"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Evaluations", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_policy_deny": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_deny"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Denies", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_challenges": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_challenges"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Challenges", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_failures": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_failures"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Failures", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_policy_trend": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_trend"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Evaluations Over Time", "type": "splunk.column"}, "viz_policy_hits": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_hits"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Apps Evaluated by Auth Policy", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_routing_rules": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_routing_rules"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Auth Policy Rules Hit", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_mfa_factors": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_factors"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Factor Breakdown", "type": "splunk.pie"}, "viz_mfa_fail_detail": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_fail_detail"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Failures by User & Factor", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_policy_denies_detail": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_denies_detail"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Recent Policy Denies", "type": "splunk.table"}}, "dataSources": {"ds_policy_evals": {"name": "Policy evaluation count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | search username=\"$user$\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_deny": {"name": "Policy deny count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=DENY | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_challenges": {"name": "MFA challenge count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | search username=\"$user$\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_failures": {"name": "MFA failure count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=FAILURE | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_trend": {"name": "Policy eval trend", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" | eval result_label=case(outcome_result=\"ALLOW\", \"Allow\", outcome_result=\"DENY\", \"Deny\", outcome_result=\"CHALLENGE\", \"MFA Challenge\", true(), outcome_result) | timechart span=1h count by result_label", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_hits": {"name": "Sign-on policy hit counts", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | where target_type=\"AppInstance\" | stats count AS evals, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"DENY\",1,0))) AS denies, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"CHALLENGE\",1,0))) AS challenges by target_name | sort -evals | rename target_name AS \"Application\", evals AS Evaluations, denies AS Denies, challenges AS \"MFA Challenges\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$", "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | where target_type=\"AppInstance\" | stats count AS evals, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"DENY\",1,0))) AS denies, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"CHALLENGE\",1,0))) AS challenges by target_name | sort -evals | rename target_name AS \"Application\", evals AS Evaluations, denies AS Denies, challenges AS \"MFA Challenges\""}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_routing_rules": {"name": "Routing rule hit counts", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | where target_type=\"Rule\" | stats count AS hits, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"DENY\",1,0))) AS denies by target_name | sort -hits | rename target_name AS \"Policy Rule\", hits AS Hits, denies AS Denies", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$", "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search username=\"$user$\" | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | where target_type=\"Rule\" | stats count AS hits, sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"DENY\",1,0))) AS denies by target_name | sort -hits | rename target_name AS \"Policy Rule\", hits AS Hits, denies AS Denies"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_factors": {"name": "MFA factor breakdown", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | search username=\"$user$\" | spath output=factor path=\"debugContext.debugData.factor\" | eval factor=if(isnull(factor) OR factor=\"\", \"Unknown\", factor) | eval factor_label=case(factor=\"OKTA_VERIFY_PUSH\", \"Okta Verify (Push)\", factor=\"OKTA_VERIFY_TOTP\", \"Okta Verify (TOTP)\", factor=\"GOOGLE_TOTP\", \"Google Authenticator\", factor=\"FIDO_WEBAUTHN\", \"WebAuthn / FIDO2\", factor=\"DUO\", \"Duo Security\", factor=\"EMAIL\", \"Email OTP\", factor=\"SMS\", \"SMS OTP\", factor=\"PHONE_NUMBER\", \"Phone\", true(), factor) | stats count by factor_label | sort -count", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_fail_detail": {"name": "MFA failures by user and factor", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=outcome_reason path=\"outcome.reason\" | spath output=factor path=\"debugContext.debugData.factor\" | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=FAILURE username!=system@okta.com | eval factor=if(isnull(factor) OR factor=\"\", \"Unknown\", factor) | stats count AS failures by username, factor, outcome_reason | sort -failures | head 30 | rename username AS User, factor AS Factor, outcome_reason AS Reason, failures AS Failures", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_denies_detail": {"name": "Recent policy denies", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=outcome_reason path=\"outcome.reason\" | spath output=client_ip path=\"client.ipAddress\" | spath output=app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=DENY username!=system@okta.com | table _time, username, app, outcome_reason, client_ip | sort -_time | head 50 | rename username AS User, app AS Application, outcome_reason AS \"Deny Reason\", client_ip AS \"Client IP\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp", "input_user"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1300, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_policy_evals", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_deny", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_challenges", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1040, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_failures", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1560, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_trend", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 170}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_hits", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_routing_rules", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_factors", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 700, "x": 0, "y": 910}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_fail_detail", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 690, "x": 710, "y": 910}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_denies_detail", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 690, "x": 1410, "y": 910}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "Policy & MFA", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: Okta: Policy & MFA Monitor
